fix_hints: Practice cases need concrete code or commands plus step-by-step explanations.
Remove extra post-backlink H2 sections and bring the note back to the 12-section template.
Use allowed difficulty wording and make applicability boundaries more concrete.
Cases describe workflows but do not include code/commands or detailed part-by-part explanations.
Historical claims are too vague to audit; either qualify them or anchor them to stable project history.
Add realistic commands, routing examples, or configuration snippets that a learner can follow.
Make buffer, routing, plugin-version, and export pitfalls more operational.

base_rule_findings: difficulty uses non-standard value 进阶
extra H2 sections appear after ## 反向链接
practice cases lack code blocks and 逐部分解释

refinement.reason: Issues affected the template, examples, frontmatter, and post-backlink structure, so a full project-template rewrite was safer than local refinement.
sections_modified: ## 适用 vs 不适用场景

audit_notes: Rewrote the note to a 12-section project template with command/routing examples and removed extra post-backlink sections.
